claims.summary: Semantic stale time should vary smoothly from low-fill lingering to high-fill pruning.
claims.disposition: Verified the sigmoid curve and recovery-hold interpolation.

claims.summary: The 0.24-0.41 and 0.35-0.45 handovers should remain monotonic without a stale-window cliff.

claims.summary: High-entropy persistence multipliers should remain bounded when combined with context support.

claims.summary: Narrative semantic retention should expose how the multipliers apply to narrative lanes.
claims.disposition: Verified NarrativeSemanticRetentionReviewV1 and its no-control review surface.

claims.summary: The stale curve or persistence multipliers should change to reduce felt flutter.
